since_last: 56% of 100 AI names green; AI Chips & Compute leads +1.64%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: a mixed, rotational tape, 56% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.79% · BTC -2.38% · Gold +0.78% · Nasdaq100 -1.88%. 56% of 100 AI names are green — a mixed, rotational tape. AI Chips & Compute is doing the heavy lifting at +1.64%.

cards.headline: AI Chips & Compute leads, AI Applications & Data Software lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Chips & Compute at +1.64%; weakest is AI Applications & Data Software at -0.87%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: BIDU is the standout at -4.14%
cards.body: Leaders: AMAT +3.67%, MU +3.24%, LEU +3.20%, INTC +2.90%, KLAC +2.83%. Laggards: BIDU -4.14%, OKTA -3.91%, D -2.53%, NOW -1.78%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -0.18% at $138.9
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -0.18% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
